description: Fix remote attach session history restoration — ensure attached sessions display complete message history identical to local sessions

userStories.title: Fix SSE race condition — always run full sync on session entry
userStories.description: As an observer attaching to a remote session, I want the full session history to load when I enter the session view, even if SSE events have already delivered some recent messages.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/cli/cmd/tui/routes/session/index.tsx, remove the guard `if (!sync.data.message[sessionId]?.length)` so that `sync.session.sync(sessionID)` always runs on mount
In src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sync.tsx `sync()` method, the fetched messages from API become the authoritative base — merge with any SSE-delivered messages that have newer IDs than the fetched set
The `fullSyncedSessions` flag is only set after a successful API fetch completes, not by SSE event population
Existing local session navigation still works correctly (navigating between sessions loads history)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Key files: src/cli/cmd/tui/routes/session/index.tsx (line ~1951), src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sync.tsx (lines 472-493). The guard at line 1951 checks `!sync.data.message[sessionId]?.length` — SSE events populate this before sync runs, causing the skip.

userStories.title: Remove hard 100-message limit on initial sync
userStories.description: As a user viewing any session, I want to see all messages in the session history, not just the latest 100.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sync.tsx line 476, remove the `limit: 100` parameter from `sdk.client.session.messages()` call so all messages are fetched
Server endpoint GET /session/:sessionID/message already returns all messages when limit is omitted — verify this behavior in src/server/routes/session.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Simple change: remove `limit: 100` from sync.tsx line 476. The server already supports unlimited fetch when no limit is specified.

userStories.title: Remove rolling window eviction in message.updated handler
userStories.description: As an observer watching an active session, I want new messages to accumulate without evicting old ones, so I can review the full conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sync.tsx, remove or raise the eviction logic in the `message.updated` handler (lines ~254-271) that shifts the oldest message when count exceeds 100
Raise the threshold to 500 as a safety bound to prevent unbounded memory growth
New messages from SSE accumulate in the store without removing previously loaded history
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The eviction code is in the message.updated case handler around lines 254-271 of sync.tsx. It checks `if (updated.length > 100)` and shifts the oldest message + deletes its parts.

userStories.title: Add cursor-based pagination to server messages endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the server to support cursor-based pagination so the TUI can lazily load older messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional `before` query parameter (message ID) to GET /session/:sessionID/message in src/server/routes/session.ts
When `before` is provided, return messages with ID < before, ordered descending, limited by `limit` parameter
When `before` is omitted, existing behavior is unchanged (return all or limited messages from newest)
Update Session.messages() in src/session/index.ts to accept and pass through the `before` parameter to the database query
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: MessageV2.stream() loads from SQLite ordered by ID. Adding a WHERE id < :before clause is straightforward. Also need to update the Zod validator for the query params.

userStories.title: Add scroll-to-top lazy loading in TUI session view
userStories.description: As a user viewing a large session, I want to scroll to the top and have older messages load automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: TUI session view detects when the user scrolls to the top of the message list
When scrolled to top, trigger sdk.client.session.messages({ sessionID, limit: 50, before: oldestMessageID }) to fetch older messages
A loading indicator appears while older messages are being fetched
Fetched older messages are prepended to the existing message list in the store
If no more messages exist (empty response), do not re-fetch on subsequent scroll-to-top
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-004 for the `before` parameter. The TUI uses solid-js rendering. Need to track viewport offset in the message list component.

userStories.title: Verify fork preserves full history from server
userStories.description: As a user who attaches remotely and forks the session, I want the forked session to contain the complete message history.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify that Session.fork() in src/session/index.ts copies ALL messages from the server database, not from client-side state
Add a test or verify existing test in test/server/remote-attach.test.ts that forks a session with >100 messages and confirms all messages are present in the fork
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Session.fork() already operates on server-side data via Session.messages(). This story is primarily verification — confirm the server path is correct and add test coverage if missing.
